name: Ava Hahn
background: Ms. Hahn has been our Senior Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Secretary since January 2020. Prior to joining Lam, she served as Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Secretary of CA Technologies from 2018 to 2019.
